content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be re-purposed as a pruning and prioritization framework for long-term memory in state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, where only memories that trigger sustained intrinsic curiosity are retained and revisited during downstream task learning. This creates a self-organizing memory system that aligns what the agent stores with what it still needs to learn to improve its active sampling efficiency.
